title: bidens tuberosa
intro: Bidens tuberosa, also known as tickseed or beggar's ticks, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, including coughs and colds. Bidens tuberosa can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, making it a valuable resource in natural and folk medicine.
